channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: 1980s panjAb terror
item.description:
Source: TW

Mega🧵: Khalistani sikh terrorists killed thousands of innocent hindus and looted them thousand of Hindus vanished by the khalistani terrorists along with the Sikhs in Punjab from 1980 to 1995.

part-2 Tommorow because of post limitations.

https://twitter.com/ZEE5India/status/2073784093834453296 Image According to official figures, some 15,000 Hindu families have sought refuge in relief camps in Delhi since 1986. Camp officials claim that the number is much higher and that the Piragarhi camp alone shelters 38,000 families. was told that in 1990 10,000-11,000 new families came. Image First of all Khalistani terrorists started targeting Hindus even before the operation bluestar.

item.title: Bengal 2021 violence
item.description:
Source: TW.

Intro

Just got off a call with @UnSubtleDesi. I couldn’t be happier for her and both of us couldn’t help but discuss the harrowing days of post poll violence in West Bengal in 2021. So I am going to share what happened five years ago just so ppl know what happened. #WestBengal2026.

After the results of the 2021 West Bengal elections were declared, news started pouring in about organised massacres of BJP cadre and Hindus who supported them or voted for them. This was not limited to anyone part of West Bengal. Horrendous videos were pouring via DMs on SM.

item.title: KAshI remodelling faults
item.description:
Source: TW

a 18th century shrine built by Ahalya Bai Holkar - showing a likeness of herself doing abhisheka to rudra, and a Shiv Linga is front - along with many other shrines such as ghorakālī shrine beneath are destroyed.

The Canada Annapurna was a small vigraha stolen from another shrine by an American in early 1900 from an open shrine near the ghat, like there are many. Repeat: this was not the “original” of Vishwanath temple panchayatan as popularly claimed by BJP supporters. The Shringeri Shankaracharya Swami did not consecrate this canada Vigraha contrary to your claim. Yogi ji did.
